caption: A man wearing a light-colored shirt and a patterned scarf stands outdoors, speaking into multiple microphones labeled with the "ANI" logo. He is surrounded by other men in suits and casual attire, with palm trees and a blurred background visible behind them. The scene is overlaid with a news broadcast interface featuring a red header and footer. The red header reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है", and the red footer displays the text "जे. पी. नड्डा: हमारा गठबंधन विकास के लिए ज़रूरी" alongside a time stamp of "10:06 PM". Small inset portraits of political figures appear on the sides of the screen with labels such as "डिप्टी CM", "मंत्री", and "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार". As the sequence progresses, the inset portraits shift, replacing "सुब्रत चौधरी" and "विजय सिन्हा" with "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" on the left side, while the main subject continues speaking in a consistent posture.
